settings.text: Tell us about your project and we’ll schedule a consultation.

settings.title: Have a Question?
settings.text:
(555) 340-2100
studio@formline.co

Initial consultations are complimentary for all project types.

settings.question: What should I prepare for a first meeting?
settings.answer: Bring any inspiration images, a rough idea of your budget, and a sense of your timeline. If you have a site or property, photos and the address are helpful. We’ll handle the rest.

settings.question: How are your fees structured?
settings.answer: Most projects are billed as a percentage of construction cost (typically 8–15%). Smaller projects and feasibility studies can be structured as fixed fees. We’ll discuss options during your consultation.

settings.question: What is a typical project timeline?
settings.answer: Residential projects typically take 9–18 months total: 3–6 months for design, 1–3 months for permitting, and 6–12 months for construction. Commercial timelines vary by scope.

settings.question: Do you handle the permit process?
settings.answer: Yes. Permit submissions, zoning review, and approval coordination are included in our standard scope of services for all project types.

settings.question: Do you provide interior design?
settings.answer: We offer interior architecture — space planning, built-ins, material selections, and finish specifications. For furniture and styling, we partner with interior designers and can recommend trusted collaborators.

settings.title: Find Us
settings.address: 85 West Jackson Blvd, Suite 400, Chicago, IL 60604

settings.title: Getting Here
settings.text: Blue Line to Jackson station, one block east. Metered street parking and paid garages available on LaSalle and Clark.
